response.justification: Nearly two decades of full-stack experience with a strong recent core in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB directly matches the primary stack, and current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work covers the role's less common agent-development requirement. Cloud (AWS CDK), Docker/Kubernetes, and a deep testing/TDD craftsmanship background round out the profile; the main gaps are no explicit Nest.js or Kotlin exposure, though polyglot history (D, Java, C++, Swift) suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Primary stack match: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, plus AWS and Kubernetes
Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience, a rare explicit requirement
Strong testing/TDD craftsmanship background with CI/CD and code-quality practices
concerns: Kotlin and Python proficiency not evidenced (Java is dated)
Significant time invested in niche D-language ecosystem rather than the role's stack
